name_en: Premium Original Leather M23951 Light Purple and White Medium. This Capucines Medium Handbag features the exquisite Lovelock braided chain. It connects hand-painted Monogram elements and the LV monogram lock with chain links. Contrasting leather constructs the iconic LV logo, exuding an elegant aura. Dimensions: 31.5 × 20 × 11 cm
